scripts.build: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist dist/kart dist/models dist/textures && cp index.html wideass-tats-game-arena.html dist/ && cp -r css js assets dist/ && cp -r public/* dist/ && cp -r kart-game/dist/* dist/kart/ && cp -r kart-game/dist/models/* dist/models/ && cp -r kart-game/dist/textures/* dist/textures/
scripts.deploy: npm run build && npx --yes wrangler deploy
